creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

Today, i tried to install freebsd 12-stable on my laptop but it hangs at boot.

As always, i am very grateful for any help i can get.

More information about the laptop:

Model: HKC NT11H: 29 cm (11 Zoll)
Boot: UEFI (Only)
CPU: Intel Atom x5-Z8350 1.44 GHz
RAM: 2 GB RAM
Storage: 32 GB eMMC
GPU: Intel HD Graphics 400
